name: Oatmeal Icebox Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients and mix well.
2. Combine the last four ingredients and blend into the first mixture.
3. Form into rolls and chill in the refrigerator.
4. Slice and bake at 375°F for 10-15 minutes.
5. When stored in an airtight container, they remain crisp. When loosely covered, they are soft and chewy.
